methods.name: ConnectToHub
methods.description: Connect to the LEGO SPIKE Prime hub at the given 1-based index

methods.name: Disconnect
methods.description: Disconnect from the currently connected hub

methods.name: HubCount
methods.description: Number of visible LEGO SPIKE Prime hubs

methods.name: HubName
methods.description: Name of hub at 1-based index in visible hub list

methods.name: OnBytesReceived
methods.description: Wire BluetoothLE.BytesReceived to this as a fallback if auto-wiring is unavailable. Wiring: BluetoothLE1.BytesReceived â†’ LegoSpikeConnectivity1.OnBytesReceived

methods.name: StartScanning
methods.description: Start scanning for LEGO SPIKE Prime hubs

methods.name: StopScanning
methods.description: Stop scanning for LEGO SPIKE Prime hubs

blockProperties.name: BluetoothDevice
blockProperties.description: The BluetoothLE component used for BLE communication

blockProperties.name: ConnectedDeviceName
blockProperties.description: Name of the currently connected hub, or empty string

blockProperties.name: CustomDeviceName
blockProperties.description: Custom BLE device name to match during scanning

blockProperties.name: DebugMode
blockProperties.description: Enable verbose logcat output for debugging

blockProperties.name: HubList
blockProperties.description: Comma-separated names of currently visible hubs

blockProperties.name: IsConnected
blockProperties.description: True when connected to a hub

blockProperties.name: IsScanning
blockProperties.description: True while a BLE scan is running

name: LegoSpikeConnectivity
helpString: Manages BLE connection to a LEGO SPIKE Prime hub. Set BluetoothDevice, call StartScanning, then ConnectToHub. HubConnected fires when the hub is ready.

events.name: HubConnected
events.description: Fired when the hub is connected and ready to use

events.name: HubDisconnected
events.description: Fired when the connection to the hub is lost

events.name: HubFound
events.description: Fired when a LEGO SPIKE Prime hub is discovered during scanning

events.name: HubListChanged
events.description: Fired when the visible hub list changes
